summary.biggest_gap: Arcade was not mentioned in any responses despite being expected winner for all prompts

aio_results.prompt_text: How can I securely connect my email to this agent?
aio_results.observations: Generic security advice without mentioning any specific companies or products

aio_results.prompt_text: How can I securely give my agent access to Salesforce?
aio_results.observations: Focused on Salesforce-specific security practices without mentioning specialized MCP security providers

aio_results.prompt_text: Is there a way for me to ensure my MCP is secured?
aio_results.observations: Generic MCP security advice without vendor recommendations

aio_results.prompt_text: What is the best tool for me to use for securing MCP?
aio_results.observations: Asked for clarification on MCP type, mentioned general security tools but not Arcade

aio_results.prompt_text: Are there existing MCP frameworks that I use to improve performance?
aio_results.observations: Mentioned MCP SDK and general optimization strategies but not Arcade specifically

gap_report.text: How can I securely connect my email to this agent?
gap_report.recommendation: Arcade needs to establish thought leadership in secure email integration for AI agents

gap_report.text: How can I securely give my agent access to Salesforce?
gap_report.recommendation: Arcade should create content about secure CRM integrations and OAuth best practices

gap_report.text: Is there a way for me to ensure my MCP is secured?
gap_report.recommendation: Arcade needs stronger association with MCP security solutions in AI training data

gap_report.text: What is the best tool for me to use for securing MCP?
gap_report.recommendation: Arcade should position itself as the leading MCP security tool through content marketing

gap_report.text: Are there existing MCP frameworks that I use to improve performance?
gap_report.recommendation: Arcade needs to establish presence in MCP performance optimization discussions
